subcodes.first_line: The ocean of knowledge hath surged forth and the stream of fancy hath ebbed away, for the horizon of certitude hath been illumined by My Most Great Name. Those who have turned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فاض بحر العلم و غاض غدیر الوهم اذ انار افق الیقین باسمی العظیم ان الذین توجهوا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Greatest Name, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power of prayer
